overview: The Wausau Police & Fire Commission held a regular meeting featuring quarterly operational updates from both the Fire and Police departments. The Fire Department presented a report on policy changes regarding controlled substances along with their 1st Quarter Report, while the Police Department provided their 1st Quarter Report on department activities.

agenda.item: Consideration of the minutes of the March 23, 2026 Regular Police and Fire Commission Meeting
Monthly Fire Department Operations Update including current activities, controlled substances policy changes, and 1st Quarter Report
Monthly Police Department Operations Update including current activities and 1st Quarter Report

discussions.item: March 23, 2026 Regular Police and Fire Commission Minutes
discussions.body: The minutes from the preceding meeting were on the agenda for consideration. No vote record was provided indicating the specific outcome of approval.
The agenda included an open discussion period for general agenda items. No specific actions or votes were recorded for this item.

The Fire Department presented their monthly operations update including current activities, a report on policy changes regarding controlled substances, and the 1st Quarter Report. This was a presentation item with no vote required.
The Police Department presented their monthly operations update covering current department activities and the 1st Quarter Report. This was a presentation item with no vote required.

actionItems: Fire Department policy changes regarding controlled substances were reported to the Commission
Next Police & Fire Commission meeting scheduled for May 18, 2026
title: Wausau Police & Fire Commission Meeting - 4/27/26
